description: Commit/timeout mutation-failure transcript for linear-transport-node (CONTEXT D-20/D-21; T-01-40/T-01-41). Each scenario supplies a raw, hostile create/update SDK failure -- deliberately embedding the security canary token and forbidden secret-shaped substrings in its own message and attached fields -- that adapter.ts's createOperation/updateOperation must convert into a typed 'unknown' MutationOutcome via redact.ts's safeError, immediately, with exactly one (or, for a commit-then-readback-timeout scenario, exactly two) SDK call(s) ever attempted and zero write retry, and every emitted byte must remain clean under redact.ts's scanCanary.

scenarios.name: create mutation call itself aborts/times out (AbortError)
create mutation observes a lower-level network failure (TypeError with a structured cause)
create mutation observes a partial GraphQL error mid-mutation (generic Error, no structured cause)
update mutation call itself fails with a generic partial error
update mutation commits successfully but its mandatory post-mutation readback times out (commit-then-timeout)
